title: Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and PayPal has banned your account. Or perhaps Stripe has restricted your access due to banking limitations or KYC requirements. You're not alone, but the conventional solutions won't work for you. You need a PayPal-free alternative for selling digital products, but what are the real options, and which one is the best fit? Let's break it down.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal is off-limits, and Stripe is restricted in many countries. Gumroad and Payhip also have country restrictions. Your options are few, but you need to understand what each platform offers. PayPal offers a broad range of payment methods, while Stripe is known for its flexibility and scalability. Gumroad and Payhip focus on digital sales, but they come with their own set of limitations. The truth is, these platforms aren't designed for creators in restricted countries. You need a solution that's tailored to your specific needs, and NOWPayments is a significant improvement over the status quo, but it's not available in 300+ coins, no KYC, no buyer account required, and NOWPayments integrates perfectly with Web3 Wallet Connect, a $19.99 solution that gives you frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. This means you can accept payments in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins, without the hassle of KYC or KYB, and Web3 Wallet Connect allows your buyers to pay directly from their wallets, eliminating the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have different approaches. PayPal might block your account altogether, while Stripe will restrict your access due to banking limitations or KYC requirements. Gumroad and Payhip might simply not be available in your country. The problem is, these platforms are not designed to handle creators in restricted countries. They often rely on third-party payment processors, which can lead to failed transactions and lost sales. Unchained Commerce is a game-changer here, as it integrates with NOWPayments, which offers a 300+ coins, no KYC, no buyer account required, and NOWPayments provides a seamless payment experience, without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed, fees, and real costs are crucial factors when choosing a platform. PayPal and Stripe are known for their fast payment processing, but they come with significant fees. Gumroad and Payhip charge a flat fee for each transaction, but their fees can add up quickly. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers a flat fee for the Core Shop Engine, and the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics to help you track your costs. Additionally, the Full Stack Bundle includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, making it a cost-effective solution for creators who want to sell digital products without the hassle of PayPal or Stripe.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for digital creators who want to sell products quickly and efficiently. Unchained Commerce offers automated delivery, payment verification, PDF receipts, and no payment processor account required. The Admin Dashboard provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easy to track your sales and delivery. This means you can focus on creating content, while Unchained Commerce handles the sales and delivery process for you, without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which platform should you choose? If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. Our Core Shop Engine offers automated delivery, payment verification, and no payment processor account required. The Web3 Wallet Connect, a $19.99 solution, provides frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. This means you can accept payments in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins, without the hassle of KYC or KYB. NOWPayments integrates perfectly with Unchained Commerce, offering a 300+ coins, no KYC, no buyer account required, and NOWPayments provides a seamless payment experience, without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative for selling digital products, you might also be interested in Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Admin Dashboard, and Web3 Wallet Connect. This solution is perfect for creators who want to sell digital products without the hassle of PayPal or Stripe. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
